---
title: "Excel Course Material"
description: "Downloadable PDF and Excel files."
image: "../../../images/Excel_Logo.jpg"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
page-layout: full
---

::: {.content-block}
:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="45%"}
### PDF
PDF File

::: {.card .shadow-sm .p-3}
![PDF Preview](/images/py_kurs_cover01.webp){.border .rounded .mb-3}

[Download PDF](../../../files/deine_datei.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary .w-100 role="button" target="_blank"}
:::
:::

::: {.column width="10%"}
:::

::: {.column width="45%"}
### Excel
Excel File

::: {.card .shadow-sm .p-3}
![Excel Preview](/images/py_kurs_cover02.webp){.border .rounded .mb-3}
    
[Download Excel](../../../files/Newsvendor.xlsx){.btn .btn-outline-primary .w-100 role="button" target="_blank"}
:::
:::

::::
:::
